title: Multi Search
description: Given a string `big` and an array of small strings `smalls`, design a method to find the location of each small string in `big`.

content.text: Given a string `big` and an array of small strings `smalls`, design a method to find the location of each small string in `big`.

Given a string `big` and an array of small strings `smalls`, design a method to find the location of each small string in `big`. Return an array of lists of locations, where `locations[i]` is all locations of `smalls[i]`.
See problem output in legacy docs.
